passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 16-22): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions given below: A famous museum issues entry passes to all its visitors for security reasons. Visitors are allowed in batches after every one hour. In a day, there are six batches. A code is printed on entry pass which keeps on changing for every batch. Following is an illustration of pass-codes issued for each batch. Batch I: clothes neat and clean lined are all by Batch II: by clothes neat all are and clean liked Batch III: liked by clothes clean and neat all are and so on...

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step V reads "Delhi was caught in power crisis", which will be "in caught Delhi power crisis was?" 1) Step I 2) Step II 3) Step III 4) None of these

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step IV reads "the load-shedding to be carried out", what would be arrangement in Step VII? 1) carried load-shedding out be to the 2) load-shedding be carried out the to 3) carried be out load-shedding the to 4) be out carried to the load-shedding 5) None of these

choices.a: carried load-shedding out be to the
choices.b: load-shedding be carried out the to
choices.c: carried be out load-shedding the to
choices.d: be out carried to the load-shedding

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If the input reads "the problem had arisen from over-drawal", what will be Step III read? 1) the arisen had problem from overdrawal 2) from arisen had problem the overdrawal 3) from arisen overdrawal problem the had 4) had the problem overdrawal arisen from 5) None of these

choices.a: the arisen had problem from overdrawal
choices.b: from arisen had problem the overdrawal
choices.c: from arisen overdrawal problem the had
choices.d: had the problem overdrawal arisen from

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If Step IV reads "to restrict the use of airconditioners", which of the following will definitely be the input? 1) use to of the airconditioners restrict 2) restrict the to of airconditioners use 3) the airconditioners of restrict use to 4) Can't be determined 5) None of these

choices.a: use to of the airconditioners restrict
choices.b: restrict the to of airconditioners use
choices.c: the airconditioners of restrict use to

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If pass-code for the third batch is "night succeed day and hard work for", what will be the pass-code for the sixth batch? 1) work hard to for succeed night and day 2) hard work for and succeed night to day 3) work hard for to succeed night and day 4) hard work for to succeed night and day 5) None of these

choices.a: work hard to for succeed night and day
choices.b: hard work for and succeed night to day
choices.c: work hard for to succeed night and day
choices.d: hard work for to succeed night and day
